title: Spinner
description: An animated loading indicator built on Lucide icons. Accepts any Lucide icon via the icon prop.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install Lucide React for the spinner icon.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the spinner component code.

examples.title: Default
examples.description: A basic spinner using the default Loader icon.

examples.title: Icons
examples.description: Spinner using different Lucide icons via the icon prop.

examples.title: Sizes
examples.description: Spinner in xs, sm, md, lg, and xl sizes using Tailwind size utilities.

examples.title: Colors
examples.description: Spinner with different text color utilities.

examples.title: In Button
examples.description: Spinner placed inside a disabled button to indicate a loading state.

examples.title: In Badge
examples.description: Spinner inside a badge to show an ongoing process.

examples.title: In Card
examples.description: Spinner centered inside a card as a full-section loading state.
